title: From George, for George – BMW George nominated in four categories!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Can we make it three in a...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Can we make it three in a row? Since 1991, BMW George has been more than just the pre-eminent BMW dealership on the Garden Route - we've been part of this region's growing success story.


> In 2023 and 2024, that ongoing commitment was recognised when we were voted Best New Car Dealership in the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards.


For over three decades, we've had the privilege of serving generations of families, building lasting relationships with our customers, supporting local causes, and delivering vehicles that move people both physically and emotionally.


> Click here to vote: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


We're proud to be a dealership where service excellence meets community spirit. Whether we're handing over the keys to a first BMW, servicing a vehicle that's put in the miles, or satisfying the needs of a family that's just added a new member to the fold, we approach every interaction with care, professionalism and pride.

We're also proud to be celebrating our first full year in our new Retail. Next concept dealership at Eden Meander. It's a dramatic transformation - from one of the oldest buildings in the BMW network to one of the most modern, digitally integrated yet intimately comfortable retail spaces in the country.

Designed to offer a seamless and immersive customer journey, from our showroom to our cutting-edge service centre, our car-side lounges to our delicious coffee, it not only reflects the evolution of the BMW brand, but also our continued commitment to placing you, the customer, at the centre of everything we do.

Because while our environment may have changed, our principles haven't. We still believe in doing the basics right: listening well. keeping our promises, following through, and going the extra mile, every time

We believe it is a combination of all these values that has made us a respected, and more importantly, trusted name in George and its surrounds. It's what has earned us your vote in years past. And it's what continues to drive us forward today.


> This year, we are honoured and humbled to be nominated again - not just once, but in four key categories:


- Best New Car Dealership
- Best Used Car Dealership
- Best Car Service Centre
- Best Motorcycle Dealership (BMW Motorrad George)

If you believe in what we do, we'd love your support again this year. Thank you for supporting us in doing what we love - and for helping us feel like the Best of George - all year round.

Visit our website here: https://www.bmw.co.za/en/retailers-pages/bmw_george.html

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
